info.title: Arc LMS API
info.description:
Multi-tenant Learning Management System API for Nigerian primary and secondary schools. Provides comprehensive academic management including sessions, terms, classes, courses, assessments, examinations, timetabling, meetings, communications, billing, and audit trails.

## Features
- Multi-tenant architecture with complete data isolation
- Role-based access control (SUPER_ADMIN, ADMIN, TUTOR, STUDENT)
- Automatic timetable generation with conflict resolution
- Nigerian academic calendar support (3 terms per session)
- Postpaid billing model (NGN 500 per student per term)
- Real-time notifications and communications
- Comprehensive audit logging
- Examination integrity tracking
- Progress tracking and report card generation

## Authentication
All endpoints (except public auth routes) require Bearer JWT authentication via the `Authorization` header:
```
Authorization: Bearer <access_token>
```

## Rate Limiting
- Default: 1,000 requests/minute per tenant
- SUPER_ADMIN: 2,000 requests/minute
- Burst: 2x sustained rate for 30 seconds

## Idempotency
All mutating operations (POST, PUT, PATCH) support the `Idempotency-Key` header to prevent duplicate operations.

tags.name: Timetables
tags.description: Automatic timetable generation and period management

tags.name: Progress
tags.description: Student progress tracking and report cards

get.description: Returns the API health status. No authentication required.

post.description: Authenticates a user and returns JWT access and refresh tokens.
Registers a new user account (for invitation acceptance or initial setup).
Sends a password reset email to the user. Reset link expires in 30 minutes.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all tenants. SUPER_ADMIN only.

post.description: Onboards a new school tenant with a principal ADMIN user. SUPER_ADMIN only. Supports idempotency.

get.description: Returns details of a specific tenant. SUPER_ADMIN only.

put.description: Updates tenant configuration and details. SUPER_ADMIN only. Supports idempotency.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a tenant and all associated data. SUPER_ADMIN only. Use with extreme caution.

post.description: Suspends a tenant for non-payment or policy violations. All API access is revoked. SUPER_ADMIN only. Supports idempotency.
Reactivates a suspended tenant, restoring API access. SUPER_ADMIN only. Supports idempotency.

get.description: Returns role-specific dashboard data for the authenticated user. SUPER_ADMIN gets platform-wide statistics, ADMIN gets tenant statistics, TUTOR gets their course and student data, and STUDENT gets their enrollment and course data.
Returns the authenticated user's profile information.

put.description: Updates the authenticated user's profile. Supports idempotency.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of users within the tenant. ADMIN can see all tenant users.

post.description: Sends an invitation email to a new user (TUTOR or STUDENT). ADMIN only. Supports idempotency.

get.description: Returns details of a specific user within the tenant.

put.description: Updates user details. ADMIN can update any tenant user. Supports idempotency.

post.description: Deactivates a user, revoking API access. ADMIN only. Supports idempotency.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of academic sessions for the tenant.

post.description: Creates a new academic session (school year). Only one session can be active at a time. ADMIN only. Supports idempotency.

get.description: Returns details of a specific session.

put.description: Updates session details. ADMIN only. Supports idempotency.

delete.description: Deletes a session and all associated data. ADMIN only. Use with caution.

post.description: Marks a session as active. Only one session can be active at a time. ADMIN only. Supports idempotency.

IdempotencyKey.name: Idempotency-Key
IdempotencyKey.description: Unique key to ensure idempotent requests. Prevents duplicate operations.

error.message: Insufficient permissions to perform this action

Conflict.description: Resource conflict (e.g., duplicate email, overlapping dates)

error.message: A resource with this identifier already exists

fields.email: must be a valid email address

error.message: Rate limit exceeded. Please try again later.

period_duration.description: Duration of each period in minutes

max_periods_per_week.description: Maximum periods per week per course

invoice_grace_period.description: Grace period for invoice payment in days

suspension_threshold.description: Days after which non-payment triggers suspension

SuperAdminDashboard.description: Dashboard data for SUPER_ADMIN role - platform-wide statistics

total_tenants.description: Total number of tenants (schools) in the system

total_users.description: Total number of users across all tenants

AdminDashboard.description: Dashboard data for ADMIN role - tenant-wide statistics

total_users.description: Total number of users in the tenant

TutorDashboard.description: Dashboard data for TUTOR role - their courses and students

total_courses.description: Number of courses assigned to the tutor

courses.description: List of courses assigned to the tutor

total_students.description: Total number of unique students in tutor's classes

StudentDashboard.description: Dashboard data for STUDENT role - their enrollments and courses

total_courses.description: Number of courses student is enrolled in

courses.description: List of courses for enrolled classes
